alert.claim: CIO push into US mega-cap tech conflicts with the client's documented aversion — escalate to RM, do not auto-rotate

nodes.label: Stay in staples/industrials, not SV bubbles
nodes.quote: keep our money in established global consumer staples and industrials ... not speculate on Silicon Valley cloud bubbles.

nodes.label: AI firms valued on pure hype
nodes.quote: These abstract software and AI firms are valued on pure hype. It feels like the dot-com crash of 2000 all over again.

nodes.label: CIO TAA: rotate into US mega-cap tech
Recommend: retain defensive posture; escalate the CIO rotation to the RM

alert.claim: Weaker aversion case after RM challenge — CIO rotation may be discussed with the client
